title: Allowed Classes
text: Allowed Classes Comma-separated list of object classes that can be held in the OLE container widget. Default value is All (all types of OLE objects are allowed in the OLE container). Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description You can select the class names of objects to be held by the OLE container. Using in ProcScript This is a static property. It cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies to uOleContainer (OleContainer) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
